name: hook contract: hook scripts run with $PWD == git repo root, not the file being edited
command: git init -q . && echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"sub/x.ts"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/print-cwd.sh" 2>out.txt && diff <(cat out.txt) <(pwd) 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
